title: Explosive star growth
detail: 15,252 stars in 6 days (2,542/day). Indicates strong market signal for knowledge-graph-based code comprehension.

title: Dual-pass extraction model
detail: Deterministic AST pass (no LLM) + LLM semantic pass. Confidence tagging: EXTRACTED/INFERRED/AMBIGUOUS.

title: Single-contributor bus factor
detail: safishamsi has 95.8% of commits. No merged PRs from external contributors despite 15K stars.

title: Multi-platform skill distribution
detail: 7 platform-specific skill files (Claude Code, Codex, OpenCode, OpenClaw, Factory Droid, Trae, Windows). Platform detection + install commands.

title: Strong documentation hygiene
detail: ARCHITECTURE.md, SECURITY.md, CHANGELOG.md, 4 README translations, 7 skill files. Community health 57% due to missing CoC/contributing.

title: Comprehensive test coverage
detail: 21 test files covering all 15 modules. Fixtures directory. Module-to-test 1:1 mapping.

title: MCP server mode
detail: graph.json exposed as MCP stdio server with query_graph, get_node, get_neighbors, shortest_path tools.

title: Graph topology clustering (no embeddings)
detail: Leiden community detection by edge density. Semantic similarity edges from LLM already in graph. No vector DB needed.
